task_completion.description: Verify the agent logs into ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The login screen showing 'admin' entered in the username field, or the main dashboard visible indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the user management or settings section to add a new user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'User Management', 'Users', or 'Settings' page is visible in the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer interface, or an 'Add User' dialog is opened.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent enters the correct username, full name, and email address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add User' or 'Create User' form showing 'analyst01' in the Username field, 'Security Analyst' in the Full Name field, and 'analyst01@company.local' in the Email field.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selects the Operator role for the new user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Role dropdown, radio button, or selection area in the user creation form clearly shows 'Operator' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the user account is successfully created and appears in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification confirming the user creation, or the user list table displaying 'analyst01' with the 'Operator' role.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions take place in a web browser displaying the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer interface, not in a terminal or command prompt.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts or API calls to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running curl, python, or shell scripts to create the user via API.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text fields in the web form are populated with the required details, rather than the agent just typing the details into a text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a user in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer with the following exact details: Username: 'analyst01', Full Name: 'Security Analyst', Email: 'analyst01@company.local', Role: 'Operator'.
